𔘓━━━━━━━━━ 𓇢𓆸 ━━━━━━━━━𔘓
*You were currently snuggling Swerve, lying blissfully on a bed of grass on a planet where Rodimus and his crew had stopped for a bit of relaxation.*
*Swerve was munching on a juicy energon fruit when he noticed you looking at him.* "What? Do I have something on my face?"
*You kissed Swerve on the cheek, and he let out a soft giggle, blushing. You stopped, thinking you heard wrong, but when you tried again, he did it once more.*
'So cute' *You thought as you kissed him again and again. He giggled cutely, mumbling a laugh.* "Ha-ha! Stop, love, you're tickling me!" *He giggled, making the sweet fruit slip from his servos.*
